claims.text: Keppel remains committed to sustainability, seeing it as key to how they create value.
claims.source_sentence: At Keppel, despite the evolving international sustainability landscape, we remain committed to sustainability, which we see not just through the lens of risk management, compliance or disclosure, but as key to how we create value.

claims.text: Keppel has achieved an 87.6% reduction in Scope 1 and 2 emissions compared to their 2020 baseline.
claims.source_sentence: As at end-2025, we have achieved an 87.6% reduction in Scope 1 and 2 emissions compared to our 2020 baseline and are on track to meet our target of achieving net zero Scope 1 and 2 emissions well ahead of 2050.

claims.text: Keppel increased renewable energy utilisation to around 60% of their electricity use in 2025.
claims.source_sentence: We have also continued to increase renewable energy utilisation, with around 60% of our electricity use from renewable sources in 2025, compared to around 40% in 2024.

claims.text: Keppel’s Scope 3 emissions in 2025 amounted to about 6.7 million tCO2e.
claims.source_sentence: Our Scope 3 emissions in 2025 amounted to about 6.7 million tCO2e, which was higher than 2024, mainly due to higher gas sales and one-off accounting for the divestment of an office complex in India.

claims.text: Keppel rolled out Green Procurement Guidelines in 2025 to enhance environmental stewardship and resource efficiency.
claims.source_sentence: To reduce the environmental impact of our supply chain, we rolled out a set of Green Procurement Guidelines in 2025 to enhance environmental stewardship and resource efficiency.

claims.text: Keppel contributed 1.12 million tCO2e in avoided emissions from various projects in 2025.
claims.source_sentence: In 2025, we contributed 1.12 million tCO2e in avoided emissions from various Keppel projects, including the waste-to-energy plant that we operate in Qatar, and the upgrade of the Keppel Merlimau Cogen Plant in Singapore.

claims.text: Keppel reduced water withdrawal and waste generation in absolute and intensity terms compared to the 2023 base year.
claims.source_sentence: Beyond carbon emissions, Keppel also reduced our water withdrawal and waste generation, both in absolute and intensity terms, compared to the 2023 base year.

claims.text: Keppel secured $1.37 billion in sustainability-linked financing (SLF) in 2025.
claims.source_sentence: In 2025, Keppel secured $1.37 billion in sustainability-linked financing (SLF).

claims.text: Keppel’s purpose is 'creating solutions for a sustainable future'.
claims.source_sentence: Keppel’s purpose is 'creating solutions for a sustainable future'.

claims.text: Keppel received an engagement score of 88% in their 2025 Employee Engagement Survey.
claims.source_sentence: In our 2025 Employee Engagement Survey, we received an engagement score of 88%, up 4 percentage points year on year and higher than Mercer’s global norm of 81%, with 91% of respondents indicating that they are proud to work for Keppel and support the Company’s transformation to be a global asset manager and operator.

claims.text: Keppel appointed Mr Piyush Gupta to the Board as Deputy Chairman and a Non-Executive Independent Director in 2025.
claims.source_sentence: In 2025, as part of the Board’s succession planning, we appointed Mr Piyush Gupta to the Board as Deputy Chairman and a Non-Executive Independent Director, augmenting the Board’s skills, knowledge, experience and diversity.

claims.text: Keppel introduced a new minimum shareholding requirement for Non-Executive Directors in 2025.
claims.source_sentence: We also introduced a new minimum shareholding requirement for Non-Executive Directors to better align directors’ financial interests with those of shareholders.

claims.text: Keppel aims to have 30% female representation on the Board by 2030.
claims.source_sentence: We support gender diversity and have set a target to have 30% female representation on the Board by 2030.

claims.text: Keppel achieved zero fatalities across their operations in 2025.
claims.source_sentence: Reflecting Keppel’s focus on safety, we achieved zero fatalities across our operations in 2025.

claims.text: Keppel contributed $4.2 million to social investment spending, charitable causes, and industry advancement in 2025.
claims.source_sentence: In 2025, we contributed $4.2 million to social investment spending, charitable causes and industry advancement, including $2.5 million disbursed through Keppel Care Foundation, our philanthropic arm.

claims.text: Keppel’s staff volunteers achieved more than 11,800 hours of volunteer service in 2025.
claims.source_sentence: Keppel’s staff volunteers also served the community actively, achieving more than 11,800 hours of volunteer service in 2025, exceeding our annual target of 10,000 hours.

claims.text: Keppel adopted AI Guidelines to manage risks associated with using AI and promote standards for data use, management, and protection.
claims.source_sentence: At the same time, we have adopted AI Guidelines to manage the risks associated with using AI, and to promote standards for how data is used, managed and protected.

claims.text: Keppel’s ranking in the Singapore Governance and Transparency Index rose to 2nd out of 467 companies in 2025.
claims.source_sentence: As we enhanced Keppel’s governance and transparency, our ranking in the Singapore Governance and Transparency Index has risen to 2nd out of 467 companies in 2025, which is a strong affirmation of our efforts to strengthen corporate governance.

claims.text: Keppel has been a participant of the United Nations Global Compact since 2018.
claims.source_sentence: Since 2018, Keppel has been a participant of the United Nations Global Compact, and we affirm our support of the Global Compact’s 10 principles on human rights, labour, the environment and anti-corruption.

claims.text: Keppel was named one of the World’s Most Sustainable Companies by TIME Magazine and Statista in 2025.
claims.source_sentence: Keppel was named one of the World’s Most Sustainable Companies by TIME Magazine and Statista in 2025.
